message:
feat(Lib): Implement quopri, reprlib, stat, stringprep, timeit modules

- quopri: MIME quoted-printable encoding/decoding (RFC 1521)
- reprlib: Alternate repr() with size limits for large objects
- stat: File mode constants and functions for os.stat() results
- stringprep: Internationalized string preparation (RFC 3454)
- timeit: Code execution timing and benchmarking utilities
